description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single build stage using the Docker image coqorg/${CI_JOB_NAME} for each job. Define a hidden .build job template that runs a before_script consisting of: if [ -n "${COMPILER_EDGE}" ]; then opam switch ${COMPILER_EDGE} && eval $(opam env); fi, then opam update -y, opam install -y -v -j ${NJOBS} coq-mathcomp-ssreflect, opam config list, opam repo list, and opam list. In the script section, run sudo chown -R coq:coq "$CI_PROJECT_DIR", coq_makefile -f _CoqProject -o Makefile, make -j "$NJOBS", and make install. Add three jobs named coq:8.10, coq:8.11, and coq:dev that extend the .build template, all executing in the build stage with no additional rules, caches, artifacts, or deployment targets.
